assessmentQuestionVersion.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Textblock_Q9
assessmentQuestionVersion.questionText:
CFQ-R respiratory domain score and date.
If the patient has switched from using one type of the questionnaire to another since your last application, indicate in the comments box what type they were using before and what type they are currently using.
If there are any other positive or negative changes in quality of life that a relevant to review, outline those in the comments box.
